recommendations.job_description_raw:
Student Success Instructor - Intern About the Role:
As a Student Success Instructor Intern at Metana, you’ll play a dual role - part mentor, part developer. You’ll guide aspiring engineers through the fundamentals of Java, Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), and System Design, while also contributing directly to the Metana Platform, our in-house software that powers thousands of learners globally.
This isn’t just a teaching opportunity - it’s a chance to work on production-level systems, understand real architectural trade-offs, and help students grasp those same principles through hands-on examples and projects.
Student Mentorship & Technical Guidance
Engage with Development
Learning Experience Enhancement
Progress Tracking & Feedback
Community Building
Skills:
Experience:
Mindset:
Real-World Engineering Experience:Work alongside experienced developers, working with modern backend tools and frameworks.
Deeper Technical Mastery:Reinforce your own expertise in Java and System Design by teaching and applying it simultaneously.
Mentorship & Communication Skills:Develop the ability to explain complex concepts clearly - a skill highly valued in engineering leadership roles.
Career Acceleration:Get exposure to production-grade systems, developer collaboration workflows, and the startup culture behind Metana’s global bootcamps.
- Support students through coreJava, OOP, and System Designconcepts including scalability, concurrency, and data structures.
- Provide one-on-one mentorship, helping learners debug, structure, and optimize their code for real-world systems.
- Collaborate with the engineering team on contributing to new features, bug fixes, and improvements.
- Gain hands-on experience inFullstack development,Spring Boot, andmicroservice-oriented architecture.
- Co-design learning content, examples, and exercises that make complex topics clear and engaging.
- Test and implement new teaching and automation strategies to improve the learning journey.
- Track student progress, identify knowledge gaps, and provide constructive technical feedback.
- Engage with learners via Slack and Discord, fostering a collaborative, growth-driven learning environment.
- Strong proficiency inJavaScript,Java,OOP, andSystem Designconcepts.
- Familiarity withAWS,PostgreSQL, andRESTful APIs.
- Excellent communication skills and a genuine passion for mentoring.
- Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree inComputer Science,Software Engineering, or a related discipline.
- Prior teaching, tutoring, or mentoring experience is an advantage but not mandatory.
- Passionate about both software development and education.
- Adaptable, collaborative, and eager to learn through hands-on problem solving. Metana Colombo, Sri Lanka

recommendations.job_description_raw:
AI Training Specialist – Intern / Trainee eBirth Business Academy is seeking a motivated and enthusiastic AI Training Specialist (Intern/Trainee) to join our growing team. This is an exciting opportunity for individuals passionate about Artificial Intelligence, technology, and education to gain hands-on experience in the rapidly evolving AI landscape.
AI trainers in Sri Lanka annotate datasets, review AI outputs, and refine prompts for language models, often in niches like South Asian linguistics and regional technology. With growing demand from BPO hubs and offshore AI firms, this role places you at the forefront of one of the most in-demand career paths in the country.
Position :AI Training Specialist – Intern / Trainee
Department :AI & Productivity / Data & Technology
Location :eBirth Business Academy – Kegalle, Sri Lanka
Employment Type :Internship / Traineeship (Full-time)
Duration :6 Months (with potential for extension)
Working Hours :8.30 AM to 5.30 PM
Key Responsibilities
Data Annotation & AI Quality Assurance:
• Annotate datasets and label training data for AI and machine learning models
• Review and evaluate AI-generated outputs for accuracy, relevance, and quality
• Perform quality checks on AI content with emphasis on cultural relevance for South Asian and Sri Lankan contexts
Prompt Engineering & Optimization:
• Refine and optimize prompts for large language models (LLMs) to improve output quality
• Develop, test, and document effective prompting strategies and frameworks
• Create localized prompts in English and Sinhala/Tamil for region-specific AI projects
AI Research & Evaluation:
• Test and evaluate AI tools and platforms for text generation, image creation, research, and productivity
• Conduct comparative analysis across AI platforms for performance, accuracy, and bias
• Stay up to date with emerging AI trends, tools, and industry developments
Content & Documentation:
• Assist in creating AI-related training materials, guides, and documentation
• Support content development for educational and business applications of AI
• Maintain organized records of workflows, best practices, and troubleshooting procedures
Requirements
Essential:
• Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree/diploma in IT, Computer Science, Data Science, Education, Business, or a related field
• Proficiency in English (written and spoken); Sinhala language skills are a strong advantage for localized projects
• Basic computing skills and familiarity with tools like Google Sheets, Microsoft Office, or similar productivity software
• Strong interest in Artificial Intelligence and emerging technologies
• Reliable internet connection and ability to work flexible hours (including for US/EU client time zones if required)
• Attention to detail and a willingness to learn
Desirable (Not Mandatory):
• Prior experience with any AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, etc.)
• Basic understanding of prompt engineering or content creation workflows
• Familiarity with basic Python or any programming language
• Experience in data entry, QA, call centers, or BPO environments
• Background in social media content creation, graphic design, or video editing eBirth Business Academy (PVT) Ltd Kegalle Town, Sri Lanka

recommendations.job_description_raw:
Community Management & Partnerships Intern This isn’t your average internship—it’s a crash course in making things happen.
As a Community Management Intern, you’ll be at the heart of our community, moderating discussions, running events, and collaborating with Web3 founders, influencers, and partners. One day, you’ll be sparking conversations on Discord, and the next, you’ll be organizing hackathons or AMAs.
If you’re passionate about Web3, have an interest in tech and love building communities, and thrive in fast-paced environments, this role is for you. Apply now and help us create a community that drives the future of decentralized technology!
Community Engagement & Growth
Event Management
Community Building
Partnerships
⠀Skills
Experience
- Be the glue that keeps conversations going across platforms like Discord, Twitter, and Telegram.
- Spark discussions, answer questions, and support community members to foster engagement.
- Find ways to optimize community interactions, making them smoother, smarter, and more valuable.
- Work with our community team to organize and run events such as AMAs, coding challenges, and hackathons.
- Collaborate with Web3 founders, influencers, and partners to create impactful activations.
- Moderate discussions and maintain a positive, professional tone across all platforms.
- Identify opportunities to grow the community and enhance member experiences.
- Assist our partnerships team in following up on important discussions and ensuring all proper documentation and collaboration plans are in place.
- Contributing towards the ideation of long-term partnership strategies (in terms of educational/training partnerships, community partnerships, strategic partnerships etc)
- Create marketing, social & content plans to assist in co-marketing and brand building.
- A natural community builder with the ability to keep online spaces active and engaging.
- Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, for moderating discussions and interacting with members.
- Social media-savvy, with a deep understanding of platforms like Discord, Twitter, and Telegram.
- Creative problem-solving skills to turn challenges into opportunities.
- Passion for Web3 and technology, with an understanding of the developer and builder mindset.
- Previous experience in community management, social media, or event coordination is a plus but not required.
- Real-World Experience:Hands-on involvement in managing and growing an active Web3 community.
- Professional Development:Opportunities to collaborate with industry leaders and enhance your skills in community building and event management.
- Impact:Play a key role in shaping a vibrant, engaged community that drives innovation in Web3.
- Collaborative Environment:Work in a dynamic, fast-paced team that values creativity, problem-solving, and community-driven growth.
- First-hand experiencein being a part of high-ticket, international partnership conversations, strategy development and relationship management. Metana Colombo, Sri Lanka

recommendations.job_description_raw:
Intern - Social Media Management (Community Management) At Outright Play, we are building a music label and entertainment company with one mission:turn artists into extraordinary icons.Our vision is bold:take culture to the world.
This internship is not about “helping out” or fetching coffee. It is afull-time, hands-on rolewhere you will manage the digital presence ofone artist or brand. You will plan, post, and engage on social media every day — while learning how a professional community is built and run.
We live by our values:
This role is designed for someone who wants to learn the craft of community management from the ground up. You will be trained, guided, and given ownership. The pace is fast, the expectations are high, and the learning is intense.
Outright Play is a Sri Lankan music label and entertainment company with one mission:turn artists into extraordinary icons.Our vision is bold:take culture to the world.
We work across music, events, publishing, and collaborations. We manage artists, produce content, build brands, and connect with audiences. Every project is a step toward raising the standard of entertainment in Sri Lanka to match the world stage.
We are asmall, founder-led teamwith the focus and determination to create something rare in this industry. That means interns here don’t just observe — they contribute directly. You will learn by being part of real campaigns, events, and artist releases.
Our work is creative, fast-moving, and global in ambition. From social media campaigns to live performances, from music videos to brand partnerships, we bring artists and culture into the spotlight.
At Outright Play, you’ll be part of a team that demands commitment, but also offers unmatched learning. What you gain here, you won’t find in a typical internship.
Our Values
As a Digital Content & Community Intern, you will take ownership of the online presence ofone artist or brandunder Outright Play. This means you won’t just be observing or supporting — you will manage a real digital community from end to end.
You will plan content, publish across platforms, and engage with followers every day. You’ll also learn how to maintain content pillars, organize media, and ensure posts meet professional standards. This internship isfull-time, and the learning is hands-on.
What you can expect:
This is a learning role — but it is also a role with real responsibility. You’ll get guidance and feedback, but the results will depend on your discipline and commitment.
We are looking foryoung people who want to learn, can focus for long hours at a screen, and are serious about building a career in digital media and entertainment.
This internship is demanding, but it gives you something rare: the chance to gainpractical, ground-floor experiencein Sri Lanka’s only focused music label with global ambition.
As an intern, you will be assignedone artist or brandto manage. This will be your responsibility during the internship — you will learn how to run a digital presence from start to finish.
Platforms you may manage include:Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, and in some cases Spotify and Apple Music (for music artists).
Your scope will include:
1. Content Pillars & Planning
2. Content Preparation
3. Quality Checks
4. Publishing & Engagement
5. Reporting & Feedback
This scope gives youfull responsibility for one entity— a smaller slice of the work, but still complete ownership. By the end of the internship, you’ll know how to manage the full digital cycle of a brand or artist.
As a Digital Content & Community Intern, you will be responsible for managing the online presence ofone assigned artist or brand.Your responsibilities will include:
1. Content Planning & Posting
2. Content Preparation
3. Engagement
4. Quality & Brand Alignment
5. Reporting & Improvement
This internship isfull-time and hands-on. You will learn how to manage a brand’s digital presence end to end, while being guided and supported by the team.
At Outright Play, internships are not for observation. They arefull-time, hands-on roleswhere you learn by doing.
Training
Probation
Work Environment
Joining as an intern here means you’ll experience the reality of how a music label runs its digital world. It will be intense, but what you learn here will set you apart.
We are not looking for experience. We are looking formindset, discipline, and the willingness to learn.
Mindset
Core Skills
Qualities That Stand Out
This internship is not about past experience. It is about showing that you canfocus, commit, and grow.If you bring the right attitude, we will teach you the rest.
Outright Play is not a big corporation. We are asmall, founder-led teamwith the ambition to take Sri Lankan culture to the world. That means the way we work is intense, direct, and hands-on.
What to Expect as an Intern
How We Work
The Payoff
This culture is not easy. It requires focus, commitment, and resilience. But if you give your best, it will prepare you for a career in music, media, or digital content like no other place in Sri Lanka.
This is not a token internship. It is afull-time, hands-on rolewhere you manage the digital presence of a real brand or artist. That means the growth opportunities are just as real.
What You’ll Gain
Your Path Forward
This internship is demanding. But if you commit, it will give you the kind of learning and exposure that no classroom or traditional internship can match.
We don’t offer the perks of a big corporation. What we offer isreal work, real learning, and real growth.
Opportunities
Growth

Future

This role is designed as a hands-on learning opportunity, allowing the intern to gain real-world marketing experience while working closely with an experienced marketing lead.
Assist in creating marketing content including videos, visuals, captions, and basic copy using modern tools (including AI-assisted tools where appropriate).
Edit and optimize content for social media platforms such as Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, and YouTube.
Adapt content styles to match different brand identities within the group.
Support daily social media activities including content scheduling and posting.
Monitor engagement metrics and help identify content trends and performance insights.
Assist in maintaining consistent brand presence across platforms.
Contribute ideas for creative marketing campaigns and promotional concepts.
Assist in planning and executing digital campaigns for product launches and brand initiatives.
Collaborate with the marketing team on storytelling and creative direction.
Participate in product photoshoots and video shoots (planning, on-site support, and post-production assistance).
Help develop brand stories and campaign narratives for different products and industries.
Learn directly from an experienced marketing lead through mentorship and practical exposure.
Gain experience working on real product campaigns across 5 different brands and industries within the Infinite Group.
Develop skills in content creation, digital marketing, branding, and campaign execution.
Exposure to modern marketing tools, workflows, and AI-powered content creation methods.
Currently enrolled in or recently completed a degree/diploma in Marketing, Media, Business, Communication, or a related field.
Strong interest in content creation, social media, and creative marketing.
Basic knowledge of social media platforms and digital trends.
Willingness to learn, experiment creatively, and take feedback positively.
Basic familiarity with content creation or editing tools (experience with AI tools is an advantage).
The internship will include regular performance feedback and evaluations.
Opportunity for permanent employment within the Infinite Group based on performance, commitment, and business requirements.
Creative, proactive, and detail-oriented.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced, multi-brand environment.
Passionate about storytelling, branding, and digital marketing.
